_comment: Legal entities to skip when checking per-company F&O cleanup-job coverage.
Match is case-insensitive against LegalEntityId. The 'dat' default/admin
company is always skipped automatically and does NOT need to be listed here.
Use this for LEs you do not actively operate in (acquisitions never used,
country setups created but dormant, historical companies kept for reporting).
Listed LEs are still collected into fo-legal-entities.json — they are only
excluded from the 'missing per-company cleanup job' check used by the
Storage Cleanup Recommendations section of the report.
Entries can be either a bare LegalEntityId string, or an object with a
Note for documentation purposes (the Note is ignored by the script).
